title: LOUISIANA WASTE REDUCTION LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 13.  LOUISIANA WASTE REDUCTION LAW

§2291.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Waste Reduction Law".  

Acts 1987, No. 657, §2.
